params.amount: Amount of USDC to borrow (6 decimals)

params._irm: Interest rate model address for the market.

params.amount: Amount of sUSDat to deposit (6 decimals)
Amount of USDC to repay (6 decimals)
Amount of sUSDat to withdraw (6 decimals)

currentBorrowRate().notice: Current USDC variable borrow rate (WAD, annualized).

depositCollateral(uint256).notice: Deposit sUSDat as collateral on the lending protocol.

healthFactor().notice: Current health factor (WAD). Returns type(uint256).max if no debt.

liquidationThreshold().notice: Liquidation threshold for sUSDat collateral (WAD, e.g. 0.825e18).

marketId().notice: The market ID (keccak256 of encoded MarketParams).

marketParams().notice: The specific Morpho market this adapter operates in.

maxBorrow().notice: Maximum borrowable USDC given current collateral (6 decimals).

rescueTokens(address,address,uint256).notice: Rescue tokens accidentally sent to this contract.

withdrawCollateral(uint256).notice: Withdraw sUSDat collateral from the lending protocol.
